2377430.name: Pixel Tennis
2377430.description:
Pixel Tennis is a captivating online multiplayer tennis experience crafted with love by a single indie developer (Heya, that's me!). Dive into the world of fast-paced arcade style tennis, where every match is a thrilling rally.



Online Singles and Double Matches
Team up with friends or go solo in intense tennis battles.

RPG like Elements
Create and customize your character. Level up and unlock new abilities with special gear. Refine items or change their appearance in your inventory.

Special Shots
Get a special racket to unleash powerful and wacky shots. Straight shots are too boring? Get the banana shot, snake shot or eagle shot. Some even go under ground...

Tutorial and Singleplayer
Do you want to learn the core gameplay mechanics? Check out the tutorial and singleplayer mode.

Secrets
There are definitely no secrets in this game.



Pixel Tennis combines the best of old-school tennis games with modern features. While it's still missing some content (like additional game modes, courts and items), the core gameplay is rock-solid. Serve, volley and smash your way to victory on various courts. Whether you are a seasoned tennis pro or a beginner, Pixel Tennis offers an accessible and enjoyable experience.

Get in the Game! It is available for free while it is still in development. Join the community, rally with friends, and serve up some fun!



Should you have any feedback, whether positive or constructive, please feel free to reach out to me via the Community Hub or the forums. This project is a labor of passion, and I welcome any suggestions <3
2377430.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 荷兰语, 土耳其语, 罗马尼亚语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
